description: Sanitized cart, address and order-submit snapshot derived from mrtang-pim/docs/rr/cart-order/1. Sensitive customer, cart, address and payment identifiers are replaced with demo placeholders.
notes: Covers add-to-cart, cart quantity change, cart list/detail, settle, address parsing, address add, freight estimate and order submit before payment.
Action endpoints replay sanitized upstream response envelopes; aggregate endpoints also keep request snapshots for frontend wiring.
